who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify, processing 10–20 purchase orders/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized retail businesses using Shopify processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient purchase order creation causes late orders. We streamline the process instead of manual spreadsheets and email approvals.
problem: Inefficient purchase order creation and approval process
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows

Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try template-based purchase order creation and email notifications for approvals on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
